title: 8 Ball Champions: PvP Pool Game
subtitle: Tools Programmer | Backend Developer | Kazoo Games | Professional
description: Working at Kazoo Games as a Tools Programmer and Backend Developer on 8 Ball Champions: PvP Pool Game, handling Azure backend tasks, gacha system development, and UI implementation.

highlights.name: Gacha System
highlights.detail: Designing and implementing the gacha system for in-game rewards and player progression.

highlights.name: Azure Backend
highlights.detail: Handling backend tasks and service integrations using Microsoft Azure.

highlights.name: Tools Programming
highlights.detail: Building internal developer tools to support and streamline the development pipeline.

highlights.name: UI Development
highlights.detail: Creating and implementing UI screens and interactive components for the game.

roles: Backend development and integration with Microsoft Azure
details: At Kazoo Games, I work as a Tools Programmer and Backend Developer on 8 Ball Champions: PvP Pool Game. My responsibilities span multiple areas including building internal developer tools, handling backend tasks with Microsoft Azure, developing the gacha system for in-game rewards and progression, and contributing to UI development. 8 Ball Champions is a live multiplayer pool game available on the Google Play Store.
